title: 怒濤の恩返しラッシュ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while out on a run...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All right! The shelf's good as new! It shouldn't give
ya any trouble now.

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for making you help me when you should be
training, Inari.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Aw, it's nothin', ma'am. DIY stuff's my specialty,
so fixin' somethin' like this was easy-peasy,
lemon-squeezy!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
At least let me give you a li'l something as thanks.
How about these strawberry mochi I just made?
You can take as many as you like.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Really? Well, then don't mind if I do!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
So, now I've got a yummy batch of mochi. That
was awful nice of her.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'd better savor these while they're fresh, since
they're a gift and all. I should probably make
some tea to go with 'em.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Hey there, Inari! Thanks again for helping us train
the other day!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
We made some inari sushi as a thank-you gift! I
hope you like it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Whoa, that's super nice of ya! Thanks so
much.

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
Inari, I wanted to thank you for helping me look
for my contact lens the other day. Here, I made
you some dango!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: O-oh, uh, thanks.

text_block_list.name: Student D
text_block_list.text:
Inari! Thanks for helping me find a home for that
stray cat! Have these rice balls as a treat!

text_block_list.name: Student E
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for treating me to lunch the other day,
Inari! It's not much, but I made this oden stew,
just for you!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what the heck's goin' on here? Why's
everyone off-loadin' food on me?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Can't help but think it's been orchestrated! But
they gotta stop—no way I can stomach all this!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Er, you look like you have a lot on your hands
already, so I can just make this for you again
another day...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you come back with that! Don't get the
wrong idea!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't raised to be rude and unappreciative of
other people's gifts! It doesn't matter how much
food you've got! Fork it over!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Ooh! That's the Inari we know and love!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Heh. Now how should I go about eatin' it all?
choice_data_list: Let's stuff our faces as fast as possible!
How about we share the food with everyone?
You should train first to work up an appetite!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Nice idea! By the time our brains catch up with
the fact that we're full, we'll have already moved
on to our post-meal tea!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Time to eat fast and enjoy every split second of
this!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Pheeew! That was delicious!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Wow! You really ate everything! But... Are you
feeling okay, Inari?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! That was a literal piece of cake! That fried
tofu skin was real flavorful, and the kelp filling in
the rice balls was tasty too...

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you're incredible!
You really did savor everything!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I'm on cloud nine after eatin' all this good
food ya made for me! I'm ready to give it my all
today, too!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Urp... That was... real tasty...

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: I-Inari? Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah... So yummy... Thanks for... the food...

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: I-Inariii!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One may have eaten everything that was
gifted to her, but it kills her appetite for the next
two days.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Now there's an idea! Let's have ourselves a picnic!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, should I get some drinks, then? I can get a
blanket for us to sit on too!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That'd be great, thanks! Feel free to invite more
of your friends while you're at it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We end up throwing an impromptu picnic in a
corner of the track.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, that's real smart! This food would go to
waste if I don't work up an appetite first!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Don't take it easy on me! I'm expectin' a real
challenge, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I throw some intense training at Inari One so she'll
be nice and hungry, and she manages to eat
everything up with a huge smile on her face.
